sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n97748" key="sugkateuqu/nw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συγκατ-ευθύνω</orth>, <sense id="n97748.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">help to direct</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">γνώμην ἐφ᾽ ὃ δεῖ</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.778f</biblScope></bibl></cit>, cf. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">446b</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
